payload.label: fireplace
payload.short_description: black metal fireplace opening with log
payload.long_description: Front view of a rectangular black metal fireplace insert set into a matte dark gray-blue surround, with a dark interior void and a single large charred log-like mass on the hearth; no flames visible and appears close to the camera (approximately 1.2 m).
